title: Blade Runner 2049
synopsis: A new blade runner unearths a long-buried secret that has the potential to plunge what's left of society into chaos.
tagline: The world doesn't end with the fall of an empire. It ends slowly.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
synopsis: On an isolated island in Brittany at the end of the eighteenth century, a female painter is commissioned to do a wedding portrait.
tagline: Do all lovers feel they're inventing something?

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
synopsis: A writer encounters the owner of an ageing European hotel between the wars, who tells him of his early years serving as a lobby boy.
tagline: There are still faint glimmers of civilisation left in this barbaric slaughterhouse.

title: Annihilation
synopsis: A biologist signs up for a dangerous, secret expedition into a mysterious zone where the laws of nature don't apply.
tagline: It's not destroying. It's creating something new.

title: Parasite
synopsis: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.
tagline: Act like you own the place.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
synopsis: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search of her homeland with a group of female prisoners.

title: Mulholland Drive
synopsis: After a car wreck on the winding Mulholland Drive leaves a woman amnesiac, she and an aspiring actress piece together her identity.
tagline: A love story in the city of dreams.

title: In the Mood for Love
synopsis: Two neighbours form a bond after both suspect their spouses of having an affair. Sensual and exquisitely restrained.
tagline: Feelings can creep up just like that.
